name: Myca MAS
description: Autonomous Multi-Agent System (MAS) by Mycosoft. Enables earth system intelligence, biological taxonomy search (MINDEX), and distributed IoT hardware command (MycoBrain).

skills.name: Biological & Genetic Search
skills.description: Cross-references global ecosystem nodes and genetic MINDEX biological data.

skills.name: MycoBrain Telemetry Access
skills.description: Communicate with geological and network IoT nodes in the physical world.
